_comment_top: Sample config for Get-PRTGMailboxFolderHealth.ps1. Drop next to the script in C:\Program Files (x86)\PRTG Network Monitor\Custom Sensors\EXEXML\ and reference via -Config '...'. Sensitive values (ClientSecret, anything ending in 'Encrypted') are decrypted with DPAPI; encrypt them on the probe with: ConvertTo-SecureString -AsPlainText -Force '...' | ConvertFrom-SecureString
_comment_auth: Use ONE of: ClientSecretEncrypted, ClientSecret, or CertificateThumbprint. Cert + ThumbprintInLocalMachine\My is preferred.
_comment_legacy: For Mode=Legacy, ClientId + CertificateThumbprint + Organization (e.g. contoso.onmicrosoft.com) must be set. The ExchangeOnlineManagement module must be installed on the probe.
